provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, ward scroll, rolled fine vellum of cream color tied with a thin gold chain clasp, bright gold wax seal stamped with a shield emblem, the vellum is smooth and pristine with gilt edges, noble gold and cream white tones suggesting divine protection, warm golden light on the seal
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Gold shield pendant/medallion on light parchment bg. Beautiful gold work but background is not dark. Item reads as an amulet, not a scroll.
